title: SMTR Pack
description:
SMTR Modpack, 为更好的MTR游玩和玩家体验而生.
SMTR Modpack,  Born for better MTR gameplay and player experience.
body:
# SMTR Pack
SMTR Pack, Born for better MTR gameplay and player experience.
SMTR Pack, 为更好的MTR游玩和玩家体验而生.
## Features / EN
- Improve your frame rate and gaming experience while playing your MTR map.
- Using WorldEdit makes it easier for you to build stations!
- Added MTR's extended mods to add icing on the cake to your station.
## 特点 / CN
- 在游玩你的MTR地图的同时提升你的帧数和游戏体验
- 使用WorldEdit可以更轻松地建在车站!
- 添加了MTR的扩展模块，让您的车站锦上添花!
